results.correct_answer: Physics (2Nd Year) Application works only when chapter-specific constraints and definitions are satisfied.
incorrect_answers: Electromagnetic Application removes the need for all constraints in every case.
Algebraic Modelling is always equivalent to Physics (2nd Year) application, regardless of context.
Physics (2Nd Year) Inference is enough even when data contradict the claim.

results.name: MPC
results.subject: MPC
results.question: Assertion-Reason in "Physics (2nd Year)": Assertion: Physics (2nd Year) inference is useful. Reason: It must still be validated. Pick the correct option.
results.correct_answer: Both Assertion and Reason are true, and the Reason correctly supports the Assertion.
incorrect_answers: Both are true, but the Reason does not explain the Assertion.
Assertion is true, but Reason is false.
Assertion is false, but Reason is true.

results.name: MPC
results.subject: MPC
results.question: Which interpretation is strongest when calculus reasoning and chapter evidence appear to conflict?
results.correct_answer: Re-examine assumptions, validate data quality, and reconcile using chapter principles.
incorrect_answers: Retain the first answer and ignore conflicting evidence.
Discard chapter logic and choose the shortest statement.
Treat all options as equivalent without analysis.
